example_issue: Several city pages have fewer than five FAQs
recommended_action: Add localized FAQ blocks to each priority city page
owner_impact: Improves user trust and objection handling
ai_visibility_impact: Improves answer extraction for AI systems

example_issue: Some local pages have schema planned but not documented
recommended_action: Document LocalBusiness or Service schema examples
owner_impact: Improves page clarity and local relevance

example_issue: Some service pages have limited links to city pages
recommended_action: Add links from service pages to priority city pages

example_issue: Some educational pages lack a clear conversion action
recommended_action: Add consultation or rental-analysis CTA blocks
ai_visibility_impact: Helps AI systems identify next-step intent

example_issue: Some pages do not provide direct answers near the top
recommended_action: Add short answer sections before longer explanation

example_issue: Optimization status is not consistently tracked
recommended_action: Use a content inventory tracker with status and priority fields
